title: New Flight Monitor System
items: reduced glass brightness effects
Added a Flight Monitoring System
Draws realtime flight telemetry from the flight sim

title: Release v3.2.0 (Flutter Migration)
items: Architecture: complete rewrite/migration from React/Tauri to Flutter, supporting Web, Desktop, and Mobile platforms
Flight Monitor: added a real-time Flight Monitor tab with SimConnect integration and an interactive CG envelope chart
Checklists: added a dedicated Concorde Interactive Checklist system
Performance: added a reheat toggle for takeoff, and enhanced landing/takeoff performance calculations with real-time METAR data
Weather: added METAR auto-fetch and refresh options from AviationWeather & VATSIM fallback
UI/UX: polished the dashboard layout, added subtle hover card effects, and implemented a cleaner dark mode styling
App Update: added auto-update notifications and rate button link
Donate: integrated a dedicated donate feature

title: Release v2.1.0
items: Flight model: introduced segmented Concorde mission profile (climb, accel, cruise-climb segments, descent) and rewired ETE/trip/endurance calculations to use it
Performance: takeoff/landing runway requirements now apply METAR/elevation corrections (QNH, ISA delta, headwind/tailwind, runway elevation) with pressure/temperature/wind breakdown in UI
Ops safety: added Operational Alerts for fuel endurance deficit, alternate risk, MTOW/MLW exceedance, runway shortfall, and notable tailwind conditions
Fuel logic: endurance now uses dynamic burn rate from mission profile, airborne fuel basis, and reserve timing for more realistic pass/fail checks
Fuel display: alternate fuel now reflects computed block alternate fuel instead of a simplified fixed-rate proxy
SimBrief flow: after import, app now prefers live METAR fetch (AviationWeather with fallback) and only keeps SimBrief METAR when live fetch is unavailable
UI copy: renamed usage counter label from SITE VISITS to EFB Launches
Desktop app: enabled external link opening via Tauri opener plugin and opener capability permission
Release metadata: version bumped globally to v2.1.0 across app, npm, Cargo, and Tauri config
UI cleanup: removed build marker display so the app surface shows semantic version only

items: d37055f fix: fuel endurance now dynamically calculates fuel endurance as per burn rate

title: Release v2.0.2
items: In-app update notification banner (Tauri updater)
Updater permissions and production endpoint configured
Fixed input focus loss in text fields
Build marker updated to 281225-2

title: Release v2.0.1
items: Major UI overhaul with improved layout and readability
Light mode with refined contrast
SimBrief import expanded (route, alternates, METARs, callsign/registration, pax, runway tokens)
Route planning improvements: auto-estimated distance with manual override
Performance calculator: takeoff/landing feasibility cues and speed references
Fuel planning expanded: trip + block (taxi/contingency/final reserve/alternate) + trim tank option
METAR improvements: fallback fetch, runway-relative wind, QNH/visibility/runway elevation
Airport/runway database auto-load with longest runway auto-pick
Diagnostics/self-tests retained and expanded
